gigapan.description:
Mikel Maron, Jay Longson, and I went out nighttime gigapanning.  I was on the sidewalk when a car zipped by, going really really fast.  Jay says a police car was right behind, but somehow I missed that.  It was such a socially transgressive behavior that I just stared with my mouth open as the driver ran the red light a block up, and then swerved to run the next red light, but was hit in the rear quarter panel and spun around.  There was drama in the Streets of San Francisco.

Mikel took his first Gigapan, here:
http://gigapan.org/viewGigapan.php?id=15369
